official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound server_links empty list body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns server_links to packet id 0x89.
For the empty list fixture, the official server_links body is one zero VarInt count byte.
For the empty list fixture, no link entries follow the count.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, link counts, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this empty list fixture to infer non-empty server link entry semantics or UI behavior.
